stemHtml: You are flying an aircraft with the call sign G-CD when you receive the clearance to proceed overhead SCHIPHOL (SPL) VOR at FL80. How must this clearance be spelled out by the ATC controller?

options.a: Golf Charlie Delta, cleared to Sierra Papa Lima at Flight Level zero eight zero.
options.b: Golf Charlie Delta, cleared to Sierra Papa Lima at Flight Level eight zero.
options.c: G-CD, cleared to Sierra Papa Lima VOR at Foxtrot Lima eight zero.
options.d: Golf-CD, cleared to SPL VOR at Foxtrot Lima eight zero.
